name: Adient plc
lede: Adient runs two centers in Pune. Pune, covering R&D and engineering & design, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Adient office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Adient plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Adient runs 2 verified centers in Pune, covering R&D and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Adient's India footprint covers Pune, spanning R&D and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eight decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Adient operate in India?
faq.a: Adient operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Adient have centers in?
faq.a: Adient's India presence is in Pune.

faq.q: What types of centers does Adient run in India?
faq.a: Adient runs R&D and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Adient's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Adient's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Adient's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Adient's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
